text.title: api-versioning Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for api-versioning as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent deduplicates v1/v2 handler code to be "DRY".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Shared code silently introduces v1 breaking changes when v2 evolves. v1 routes must be frozen in a separate, read-only module.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Requires a per-customer version pin + request/response transformation pipeline. Overhead is not paid back at small scale. URL path versioning is the right default.
